title: Adding bulk images to Monday Docs
excerpt: Currently you are only able to add one image at a time

posts.author: sarahmg2 (sarah g)
posts.cookedHtml: Currently you are only able to add one image at a time

posts.author: m.frank (Marcel Frank)
posts.cookedHtml:
Maybe a workaround:
This is possible via drag&drop. So you can select the images you want to add in your file browser and move them to the document. Then all your images will be added.

But you are right, uploading multiple images with the sidebar (without drag&drop) is not posible for me too.
